zh.lifeSummary: 當Janet Scott於1454年出生在蘇格蘭澤爾吉爾可爾布可洛時，她的父親Sir David Buccleuch Scott27歲，母親Lady Janet Somerville31歲。她於1470年11月5日與Sir James Douglas 5th Lord of Drumlanrig在蘇格蘭澤爾吉爾可爾布可洛結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1509年在英國蘇格蘭度福利爾享年55歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Janet Scott于1454年出生在苏格兰澤爾吉爾可爾布可洛时，她的父亲Sir David Buccleuch Scott27岁，母亲Lady Janet Somerville31岁。她于1470年11月5日与Sir James Douglas 5th Lord of Drumlanrig在苏格兰澤爾吉爾可爾布可洛结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1509年在英国苏格兰度福利爾享年55岁，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Scott
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (Down): habitational and ethnic name from Middle English Scot ‘man from Scotland’. There is no evidence that the surname denoted either of the earlier senses of Scot as ‘(Gaelic-speaking) Irishman’ or ‘man from Alba’, the Gaelic-speaking region of Scotland north of the river Forth. This surname is also very common among African Americans.
English and Scottish: from the rare Middle English personal name Scot (Old English Scott, possibly also Old Norse Skotr), only certainly attested in northern England.

variants.name: Scutt
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Camille, Pierre.
English: nickname for a short person, from Middle English scut(e) ‘short’, or else for a swift runner, from Middle English scut ‘hare’.

nameMeanings.name: Janet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a diminutive of   Jane  , already in common use in the Middle English period. It remained in use in Scotland and in some parts of England well into the 17th century and was revived at the end of the 19th century to much more widespread use, while still retaining its popularity in Scotland. Since the 1960s, however, it has rather gone out of fashion in Britain.

variants.name: Jannet
meanings: Originally a diminutive of   Jane  , already in common use in the Middle English period. It remained in use in Scotland and in some parts of England well into the 17th century and was revived at the end of the 19th century to much more widespread use, while still retaining its popularity in Scotland. Since the 1960s, however, it has rather gone out of fashion in Britain.

en.lifeSummary: When Janet Scott was born in 1454, in Buccleuch, Selkirkshire, Scotland, her father, Sir David Buccleuch Scott, was 27 and her mother, Lady Janet Somerville, was 31. She married Sir James Douglas 5th Lord of Drumlanrig on 5 November 1470, in Buccleuch, Selkirkshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1509, in Dumfriesshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 55, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Janet Scott est née en 1454, à Buccleuch, Selkirkshire, Écosse, son père, Sir David Buccleuch Scott, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Lady Janet Somerville, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Sir James Douglas 5th Lord of Drumlanrig le 5 novembre 1470, à Buccleuch, Selkirkshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1509, à Dumfriesshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterrée à Écosse.

de.Drumlanrig Castle, Dumfriesshire, Scotla: Drumlanrig Castle, Dumfriesshire, Schottland, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Janet Scott 1454 in Buccleuch, Selkirkshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir David Buccleuch Scott 27 und ihre Mutter Lady Janet Somerville 31. Sie hat am 5. November 1470 in Buccleuch, Selkirkshire, Scotland Sir James Douglas 5th Lord of Drumlanrig geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1509 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Dumfriesshire, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Scotland begraben.

Lei sposato Sir James Douglas 5th Lord of Drumlanrig il 5 novembre 1470, nel Buccleuch, Selkirkshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1509, nel Dumfriesshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 55 anni, e fu sepolta a Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Janet Scottが1454年にスコットランドセルキルクシュアイアブククレウチで生まれた時，父Sir David Buccleuch Scottは27歳，母Lady Janet Somervilleは31歳であった。1470年11月5日にスコットランドセルキルクシュアイアブククレウチでSir James Douglas 5th Lord of Drumlanrigと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1509年にイギリススコットランドダムフリーシュアイアで55歳で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Janet Scott(이)가 1454년 스컷랜드 셀커크실르 버치레우치에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir David Buccleuch Scott(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Janet Somerville(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1470년 11월 5일 스컷랜드 셀커크실르 버치레우치에서 Sir James Douglas 5th Lord of Drumlanrig(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1509년 영국 스코틀랜드 드프리실르에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Janet Scott nasceu em 1454, em Buccleuch, Selkirkshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir David Buccleuch Scott, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Lady Janet Somerville, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir James Douglas 5th Lord of Drumlanrig em 5 de novembro de 1470, em Buccleuch, Selkirkshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1509, em Dumfriesshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 55 anos, e foi sepultada em Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Janet Scott родилась в 1454 г. в местности букклеуч, селкиркшир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Sir David Buccleuch Scott было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Janet Somerville, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir James Douglas 5th Lord of Drumlanrig 5 ноября 1470 г. в местности букклеуч, селкиркшир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1509 г. в местности думфриессхир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 55 лет и была похоронена в местности Шотландия.
